dispatch_policy: Operator policy: WORKERS -> pi via .claude/skills/manager/references/launchers/parent-claude/pi-watch.sh; MANAGERS -> Claude Opus via parent-claude/claude-watch.sh; NEVER the Claude Agent tool. Contracts live under team/contracts/; handoffs/findings under team/evidence/handoffs/.

mission_queue.title: Attended ground-truth CDP probe — de-risk the backend-api/project/selector assumptions.
mission_queue.notes: DONE + VERIFIED 2026-06-18 (pi worker, own-tab-only/read-only/no-sends; safety held — no tracked changes, no commit, no leak). VERDICT: backend-api capture CONFIRMED with adjustment. Findings: team/evidence/handoffs/M2-ground-truth-probe.md. KEY: GET /backend-api/conversation/<id> with cookies/accept-only -> 404; with the web-app headers (Authorization bearer + oai-client-* + oai-device-id + oai-session-id + x-openai-target-path/route) -> 200, ~17MB, ~5k mapping nodes, faithful canonical markdown incl. \widehat/\frac/\ne, \(/\[, md tables. DR/Pro turns = large turn_exchange_id groups (hidden thoughts/code/tool nodes + final visible assistant:text report); citations in metadata.content_references/citations/search_result_groups. Attachments via metadata.attachments / content_references[type=file] / content.assets.asset_pointer / aggregate_result (ids+pointers, no literal /files/ URLs seen). Completion signals: async_status / metadata.is_complete/is_finalizing/pro_progress / node status (consider /stream_status). Clipboard feasible only with grant. Selectors: composer #prompt-textarea (contenteditable), tools_button button[data-testid=composer-plus-btn], copy_button button[data-testid=copy-turn-action-button], turns [data-message-id][data-message-author-role], model picker label-driven (no stable test-id). NOTE: scrape target was ACTIVELY UPDATING (likely another agent's keep-pushing loop).

mission_queue.title: Model/tools selection + keep-pushing loop + tab-pool/rate.
mission_queue.run_handle: Opus MANAGER (claude-watch.sh), dispatched 2026-06-19 (operator: continue). Build OFFLINE first (menus Radix select/verify, TabPool, AdaptiveSendBudget, loop; mock-proven). Then MINIMAL real legs (attended, own-tab, FRESH throwaway chats ONLY, NOT the target/foreign tabs): real model/tool selection (NO send, sustained-read per model-label-transient); FIRST REAL SEND = one trivial smoke 'Reply with only the word: PONG' to a fresh chat (verify new-turn gotcha-4 + completion + capture); loop-verify 2 iters. Total real sends <=4. Human-paced (other agent shares the account). Contract team/contracts/M7-model-tools-loop.md. SESSION 1 stalled after T1a (manager wrongly dispatched-and-yielded; claude -p is single-shot, no re-invocation). T1a DONE+committed (cdp 9ee0897 + budget/tabpool a0d33b5; uv run pytest=224). Orphaned T1a worker killed. CONTINUATION dispatched 2026-06-19 with BLOCK-AND-COMPLETE rule (run T1b-T4 in ONE turn, block on each worker via pi-watch --wait-seconds, never yield). Remaining: T1b menus/draft-send/loop -> T2 offline verify -> T3 real legs (model/tool select + 1 PONG send-smoke + 2-iter loop, <=4 sends, fresh chats) -> T4 verify+handoff. OUTCOME (continuation b6o60dpni): PARTIAL + verified. Offline tool DONE (menus/draft-send/loop/tabpool/budget; lead re-ran uv run pytest=247). FIRST REAL SEND PROVEN: gotcha-4 passed 3x on the live site (new user turns appeared) + safe (2 sends total, fresh throwaway chats, target 6a316aa8 untouched, no leak, stable 779eb40 unmoved). T4 audit M7-scope=PASS. 2 REAL-SITE GAPS deferred: (1) fresh-chat capture-auth BACKEND_AUTH_UNAVAILABLE (in-page backend auth/OAI headers not harvestable on a NEW chat; M6 existing-conv capture works); (2) live model/tool selectors do not match the real composer (offline impl correct+mock-proven; needs real-DOM rediscovery like M2). Handoff team/evidence/handoffs/M7-model-tools-loop.md; evidence commit 522b2b6. Escalation to lead: pre-existing v1 real-responses tracked in archive/orchestration-v1/ (committed bf208d8 at team setup; archive is read-only/historical per charter).
mission_queue.notes: Opus manager. General label-driven model + tools (validated: Pro Extended, Deep Research) via Radix portal enumeration (model picker has no stable test-id). keep-pushing loop (persistent session, verify each turn). tab pool (lazy-open, idle-evict, LRU) + adaptive send-rate (backoff + politeness floor). Adversarially review any GPT-facing prompt.
